'''âdh-s-w''' ('''kadhasaw''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:macadamize|macadamize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-s-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:macadamize|macadamize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-s-w
|-
! Lemma
| kadhasaw
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhasaw|thidhasaw]] || [[word:jidhasaw|jidhasaw]] || [[word:shidhasaw|shidhasaw]] || [[word:kidhasaw|kidhasaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhasaw|thuthudhasaw]] || [[word:jujudhasaw|jujudhasaw]] || [[word:shushudhasaw|shushudhasaw]] || [[word:kukudhasaw|kukudhasaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhasaw|thudhasaw]] || [[word:judhasaw|judhasaw]] || [[word:shudhasaw|shudhasaw]] || [[word:kudhasaw|kudhasaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhasaw|thudhasaw]] || [[word:judhasaw|judhasaw]] || [[word:shudhasaw|shudhasaw]] || [[word:kudhasaw|kudhasaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhasaw|thedhasaw]] || [[word:jedhasaw|jedhasaw]] || [[word:shedhasaw|shedhasaw]] || [[word:kedhasaw|kedhasaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhasaw|thothodhasaw]] || [[word:jojodhasaw|jojodhasaw]] || [[word:shoshodhasaw|shoshodhasaw]] || [[word:kokodhasaw|kokodhasaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhasaw|thodhasaw]] || [[word:jodhasaw|jodhasaw]] || [[word:shodhasaw|shodhasaw]] || [[word:kodhasaw|kodhasaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhasaw|thodhasaw]] || [[word:jodhasaw|jodhasaw]] || [[word:shodhasaw|shodhasaw]] || [[word:kodhasaw|kodhasaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdhasaw|thĂŠdhasaw]] || [[word:jĂŠdhasaw|jĂŠdhasaw]] || [[word:shĂŠdhasaw|shĂŠdhasaw]] || [[word:kĂŠdhasaw|kĂŠdhasaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhasaw|thathadhasaw]] || [[word:jajadhasaw|jajadhasaw]] || [[word:shashadhasaw|shashadhasaw]] || [[word:kakadhasaw|kakadhasaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhasaw|thadhasaw]] || [[word:jadhasaw|jadhasaw]] || [[word:shadhasaw|shadhasaw]] || [[word:kadhasaw|kadhasaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhasaw|thadhasaw]] || [[word:jadhasaw|jadhasaw]] || [[word:shadhasaw|shadhasaw]] || [[word:kadhasaw|kadhasaw]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhasaw|shadhasaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhasaw|goshadhasaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhasaw|gokishadhasaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhasawnĂŒ|shadhasawnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhasawnknĂŒ|goshadhasawnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhasawnĂŒ|gokishadhasawnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhasawshĂ«|shadhasawshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhasawnkshĂ«|goshadhasawnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhasawshĂ«|gokishadhasawshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhasawro|shadhasawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhasawnkro|goshadhasawnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhasawro|gokishadhasawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhasawmu|shadhasawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhasawnkmu|goshadhasawnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhasawmu|gokishadhasawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhasawsher|shadhasawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhasawnksher|goshadhasawnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhasawsher|gokishadhasawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhasawng|shadhasawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhasawnkng|goshadhasawnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhasawng|gokishadhasawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhasawya|shadhasawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhasawnkya|goshadhasawnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhasawya|gokishadhasawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhasawyam|shadhasawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhasawnkyam|goshadhasawnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhasawyam|gokishadhasawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhasawnĂŒshĂ«|shadhasawnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhasawnknĂŒshĂ«|goshadhasawnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhasawnĂŒshĂ«|gokishadhasawnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhasawnĂŒro|shadhasawnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhasawnknĂŒro|goshadhasawnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhasawnĂŒro|gokishadhasawnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhasawnĂŒmu|shadhasawnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhasawnknĂŒmu|goshadhasawnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhasawnĂŒmu|gokishadhasawnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhasawshĂ«nĂŒ|shadhasawshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhasawnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadhasawnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhasawshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadhasawshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhasawshĂ«ro|shadhasawshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhasawnkshĂ«ro|goshadhasawnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhasawshĂ«ro|gokishadhasawshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhasawshĂ«mu|shadhasawshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhasawnkshĂ«mu|goshadhasawnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhasawshĂ«mu|gokishadhasawshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhasawronĂŒ|shadhasawronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhasawnkronĂŒ|goshadhasawnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhasawronĂŒ|gokishadhasawronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhasawroshĂ«|shadhasawroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhasawnkroshĂ«|goshadhasawnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhasawroshĂ«|gokishadhasawroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhasawromu|shadhasawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhasawnkromu|goshadhasawnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhasawromu|gokishadhasawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhasawmunĂŒ|shadhasawmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhasawnkmunĂŒ|goshadhasawnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhasawmunĂŒ|gokishadhasawmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhasawmushĂ«|shadhasawmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhasawnkmushĂ«|goshadhasawnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhasawmushĂ«|gokishadhasawmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhasawmuro|shadhasawmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhasawnkmuro|goshadhasawnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhasawmuro|gokishadhasawmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
